---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What's frustrating or missing today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional context

Mockups, examples, a target ATS/site, a locale you'd like supported, etc.
